MaintenancePassRequest.title: MaintenancePassRequest
MaintenancePassRequest.description:
Request body for POST /maintenance-pass/{session_id}.

Request contract for the maintenance-pass endpoint; result and drift-signal
contracts live alongside it in this module.

reference_injection_budget_basis_chars.title: Reference Injection Budget Basis Chars
reference_injection_budget_basis_chars.description: Configured memory injection cap used only as the basis for resolving the independent reference budget. This remains stable when a turn temporarily disables main memory injection.

reference_injection_enabled.title: Reference Injection Enabled
reference_injection_enabled.description: Controls the independent reference lane without re-enabling a main memory lane suppressed for the current turn.

primary_canon_base_max_chars.title: Primary Canon Base Max Chars
primary_canon_base_max_chars.description: Optional Primary Canon Base subbudget within the resolved reference injection total. Absent or 0 disables the base; it is never an additional independent budget.
